title: US CBDC ban to go into effect without Trump signoff on housing bill
summary: Donald Trump confirmed on social media that he would not sign the 21st Century ROAD to Housing Act, which includes a ban on a US CBDC until the end of 2030, setting the stage for the bill to become law on Saturday.

title: New Hampshire council votes down $100M Bitcoin bonds
summary: State representative Keith Ammon said the New Hampshire executive council's vote against Bitcoin-backed bonds was “short-sighted,” urging the body to reconsider the measure.

title: SK Hynix Climbs 13% After Record $26.5 Billion US Offering
summary: SK Hynix Inc. delivered a 13% gain in its debut trading day on a US exchange, after breaking the record for the biggest first-time share sale by a foreign company.

title: S&P 500 Rises Before Earnings as SK Hynix Debuts: Markets Wrap
summary: Wall Street traders drove stocks higher in the countdown to the earnings season, with SK Hynix Inc. jumping in its debut and the market parsing the latest geopolitical developments.

title: Circle (CRCL) Wins Final OCC Approval for National Trust Bank
summary:
Bitcoin Magazine

Circle (CRCL) Wins Final OCC Approval for National Trust Bank
Circle won final OCC approval to establish a national trust bank, allowing it to place USDC reserves under federal oversight and expanding its regulated digital asset custody business.

title: Metaplanet Announces Joint Study to Bring Bitcoin-Backed Digital Credit to Japan
summary:
Bitcoin Magazine

Metaplanet Announces Joint Study to Bring Bitcoin-Backed Digital Credit to Japan
Metaplanet is taking its Bitcoin strategy beyond treasury accumulation, launching a study to explore tokenized, Bitcoin-backed credit products that could reshape Japan's debt market.

title: Bitcoin Treasury Firm Empery Digital Dumps Nearly Half of BTC Holdings for $87 Million
summary: Nasdaq-listed Empery Digital said it sold 1,400 Bitcoin since May to help fuel an AI data center deal, legal bills, and other expenses.

title: Xbox CEO Joins Fed AI Jobs Task Force Days After Announcing 3,200 Layoffs
summary: Asha Sharma will advise the Federal Reserve on AI’s impact on jobs and productivity as Xbox undergoes the biggest restructuring in its history.

title: Here’s what’s next for the Clarity Act as Congress returns to Washington
summary: Congress returns to Washington next week, ready to take up cryptocurrency legislation before the midterm election calendar takes over.

title: SK Hynix’s $26.5 billion US listing brought to Telegram users via xStocks
summary: Solana said that tokenized SK Hynix shares on SOL can be acquired through Backpack, xStocks and Ondo Finance.

title: Investors sell longer-dated AI debt amid Big Tech borrowing spree
summary: Waning demand highlights scepticism over sector’s long-term profitability

title: SK Hynix’s US shares jump 14% on Nasdaq debut
summary: South Korean memory chipmaker’s US-listed stock price rose as high as $175 after pricing at $149
